_note: nodes.json — Network identity and topology for ixo.lol
_usage: Loaded by config.js, stats_server.py, and the dashboard at runtime. Defines the domain, Tailscale network, all physical machines, and the Jellyfin public carve-out. To add a friend node: add an entry to 'nodes', fill in their Tailscale IP once assigned, and list the services they host.

_fields.domain: Registered domain name — all subdomains are built from this
_fields.tailnet: Tailscale organization/network name — set during Tailscale account creation
_fields.nodes[].id: Short unique key used in code references
_fields.nodes[].displayName: Human-readable name shown in the dashboard UI
_fields.nodes[].owner: Authentik username of the person who owns/runs this machine
_fields.nodes[].tailscaleIP: Tailscale-assigned IP (100.x.x.x range) — fill in after joining Tailnet
_fields.nodes[].lanIP: LAN IP — set a static DHCP reservation in your router so this never changes
_fields.nodes[].services: Array of service IDs (matching services.json) hosted on this node
_fields.nodes[].healthCheckPort: Port the stats agent pings to determine if node is online
_fields.nodes[].healthCheckPath: HTTP path for health check — defaults to / if omitted
_fields.nodes[].offlineMessage: Message shown in dashboard when this node is unreachable
_fields.nodes[].powerManaged: true = Pi manages this node power via smart plug
_fields.nodes[].smartPlugIP: LAN IP of the smart plug controlling this node (if powerManaged)

nodes.offlineMessage: Main server is offline — Jellyfin, game streaming, and AI are unavailable. The Pi Sentry is still running.
Pi Sentry is offline — books, audiobooks, retro games, and file storage are unavailable.
nodes.notes: 24/7 always-on node. Houses 15TB archive via Penta SATA HAT. Controls PC power via smart plug. All services run as Docker containers.

nodes.offlineMessage: FILL_IN_DISPLAY_NAME's PC is currently offline — this service is unavailable.
FILL_IN_DISPLAY_NAME's PC is currently offline — this service is unavailable.

jellyfinPublic._comment: The ONE port exposed to the raw internet — for Smart TV apps that cannot run Tailscale.
jellyfinPublic.note: TV app users need a Jellyfin-native password. SSO does not work for TV apps.

tailscaleACLNotes._comment: Tailscale ACL rules — paste into tailscale.com/admin/acls

policy.description: Hub-and-spoke. Users reach hub and sentry. Hub/sentry reach each other and friend nodes. Users cannot reach friend nodes directly.

rules.comment: Hub and Sentry can reach all friend nodes
Hub can reach Sentry (SMB, Docker, SSH, power scripts)
Sentry can reach Hub (Jellyfin API, SSH for shutdown)
Users reach hub and sentry — Caddy handles per-service auth
Users cannot reach friend nodes directly
